title: Autoresearch: claude-mem (Juli 2026)
description:
Monthly autoresearch loop for **claude-mem**.

Memory plugin (SQLite + Chroma + Express worker on port 37777). Optimize accuracy of memory retrieval, hook latency, and compression quality.

**Target path:** `/root/.openclaw/claude-mem`
**Focus areas:** retrieval accuracy, hook latency, compression quality

Run /autoresearch (agent-growth-suite) against this target.
Measure before/after. Keep only improvements that score better.
Commit results and document in AUTORESEARCH-LOG.md.
